200.html:
investigation_id [required]

string

Echoes the investigation ID that the remediation runs against.

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

request.html:
connection_id [required]

string

The Action Platform AWS connection ID to execute through. Must carry the integration_aws connection prefix.

investigation_id [required]

string

The ID of the investigation to remediate.

200.html:
investigation [required]

object

A single ECS remediation investigation: a detected issue together with its proposed plan, history, and ECS workload metadata.

code_session

object

A linked code session (for example, a pull request) for the investigation.

id

string

Code session ID.

pull_request_status

enum

Pull request status for a linked code session. Allowed enum values: open,closed,merged

created_at_ms

string

Creation time in epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

guardrail_decision

object

The guardrail decision applied to a plan or investigation.

decision

enum

The verdict a guardrail applied to a plan or investigation. Allowed enum values: allowed,approval_required,denied

guardrail_id

string

ID of the matching guardrail. Set when the decision is not denied; may be empty when denied because no rule matched.

history

[object]

Ordered list of history events for the investigation.

event_type

string

The type of event.

id

string

History event ID.

payload

string

Opaque JSON event body, base64-encoded. Decode and parse according to event_type.

timestamp_ms

string

Event time in epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

id

string

Unique investigation ID.

issue_type

string

The detected issue type.

last_action_at_ms

string

Time of the last action in epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

metadata

object

ECS-specific context for the investigation.

account_id

string

AWS account ID.

capacity_providers

[string]

Associated capacity providers.

cluster_arn

string

ECS cluster ARN.

cluster_name

string

ECS cluster name.

impact_score

string

Computed impact score for ranking (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

issue_start_time

string

When the issue was first detected, epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

launch_type

enum

ECS launch type. Allowed enum values: EC2,FARGATE

region

string

AWS region.

task_arns

[string]

All affected task ARNs, for filtering.

task_definition_family

string

Task definition family name.

task_definition_revision

int64

Current task definition revision.

tasks

[object]

Individual tasks exhibiting issues. Capped at 50 most recent.

availability_zone

string

Availability zone where the task is running.

container_instance_arn

string

Container instance ARN (EC2 launch type only).

containers

[object]

Problematic containers within the task.

cpu_limit

int64

CPU limit.

exit_code

int32

Exit code if the container stopped.

health_status

string

Container health status.

image

string

Docker image URI.

last_status

string

Container status.

memory_limit_mib

int64

Memory limit in MiB.

name

string

Container name from the task definition.

reason

string

Stop reason.

cpu_units

string

CPU units allocated to the task (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

desired_status

string

Desired task status.

execution_role_arn

string

IAM role used by ECS to pull images and fetch secrets.

health_status

string

Task-level health status.

issue_start_time

string

When this task's issue started, epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

issue_type

string

Issue type for this specific task.

last_status

string

Current task status.

launch_type

enum

ECS launch type. Allowed enum values: EC2,FARGATE

memory_mib

string

Memory in MiB allocated to the task (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

stop_code

string

Stop code if the task was stopped.

stopped_reason

string

Stop reason if the task was stopped.

tags

[string]

Task-level tags.

task_arn

string

Full task ARN.

task_definition_arn

string

Task definition ARN with revision.

task_role_arn

string

IAM role used by the task at runtime.

total_cpu_units

string

Sum of CPU units across affected tasks (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

total_memory_mib

string

Sum of memory (MiB) across affected tasks (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

update_timestamp

string

When this metadata was last updated, epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

workload_summary

object

Aggregated health across all tasks in a workload (service or daemon).

deployment_rollout_state

enum

ECS deployment state, populated only for deployment failures. Allowed enum values: IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED,FAILED

desired_count

string

Expected task count (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

failed_count

string

Tasks in a problematic state (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

failed_percent

string

Percentage of desired count that is failed (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

pending_count

string

Tasks currently pending (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

previous_task_definition

string

Previous deployment's task definition, as family:revision or a full task definition ARN. Empty when no rollback target is visible.

running_count

string

Tasks currently running (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

workload_type

enum

The kind of ECS workload that owns the problematic tasks. Allowed enum values: WORKLOAD_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED,SERVICE,STANDALONE_TASK,DAEMON

org_id

string

Datadog organization ID that owns the investigation (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

plan

object

The remediation plan proposed by the ECS remediation agent.

confidence

enum

The agent's self-rated confidence in a plan. Allowed enum values: low,medium,high

evidence

string

Evidence supporting the diagnosis. Treat as user-provided content and escape before display.

explanation

string

Human-readable summary of why the plan was proposed. Treat as user-provided content and escape before display.

guardrail_decision

object

The guardrail decision applied to a plan or investigation.

decision

enum

The verdict a guardrail applied to a plan or investigation. Allowed enum values: allowed,approval_required,denied

guardrail_id

string

ID of the matching guardrail. Set when the decision is not denied; may be empty when denied because no rule matched.

plan_source

enum

How the plan was produced. Allowed enum values: deterministic,ai

proposed_fix

[object]

Recommendation-oriented view of the candidate remediations, distinct from the execution-oriented steps.

description

string

Explanation of the proposed change and why it resolves the root cause. Treat as user-provided content and escape before display.

reversible

boolean

Whether the proposed fix can be reversed after execution.

risk

enum

Estimated risk of a remediation step or proposed fix. Allowed enum values: low,medium,high

title

string

Short title for the proposed fix.

status

enum

Plan status. Allowed enum values: pending,in_progress,completed,failed

steps

[object]

Execution-oriented steps that make up the plan.

action_fqn

string

Fully qualified action type, for example ecs.update_service_memory.

approval_state

enum

Approval state for a remediation step. Allowed enum values: pending_approval,approved,rejected

description

string

Human-readable description of the step.

reversible

boolean

Whether the step can be reversed after execution.

risk

enum

Estimated risk of a remediation step or proposed fix. Allowed enum values: low,medium,high

step_id

string

Unique ID for the step within the plan.

resource_arn

string

ARN of the ECS resource the investigation is about.

status

enum

Investigation status. Allowed enum values: open,approval_required,executing,succeeded,failed

updated_at_ms

string

Last update time in epoch milliseconds (64-bit integer encoded as a string).

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.
